role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified German language and specific place names (Bad Ragaz, Sargans) and the cantonal code 'GR'.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain (Alpine peaks, valleys) and settlement patterns without drifting into regulatory or linguistic claims.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Discussed forest composition (coniferous/deciduous mix) and biome types appropriate to the alpine region.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Focused on road sign formats (red rectangular signs) and infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues like street lamp design and industrial waste container styles.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. All agents adhered to their domains, provided concrete evidence, and the tournament correctly identified Switzerland based on the definitive place names on the signs.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Place names and script match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Alpine terrain and valley settlement accurately described.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Forest types are consistent with the visible vegetation.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Signage style and road markings accurately described.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Street furniture and building styles match the visual evidence.
